name: Complementary folded cascode, CFP AB output
input_stage: JFET differential pair with source degeneration
vas: Complementary folded cascode with current mirror loads
output: Complementary feedback pair/Sziklai local output, Class AB
notes: Best headroom and local output linearity, but CFP stability must be proven carefully.

name: Quasi-complementary high-bias AB
output: High-bias quasi-complementary emitter follower, Class AB
notes: Soft crossover from higher idle current, but asymmetry and heat are disadvantages.

name: Complementary cascoded VAS, triple EF AB
vas: Symmetric NPN/PNP cascodes with emitter degeneration
notes: Low output impedance, but triple EF wastes too much headroom on +/-15 V rails.

name: Balanced-cancellation cascode, double EF AB
input_stage: Balanced input pair, one side grounded for SE input
vas: Symmetric cascoded halves for even-order cancellation
notes: Uses Son-of-Zen style cancellation in a conventional low-voltage AB architecture.

name: Complementary cascoded VAS, double EF AB
vas: Symmetric NPN/PNP cascodes with emitter degeneration
notes: Good practical balance for low-voltage AB: symmetric VAS without excessive output drop.

name: Diamond input, symmetric cascode, double EF AB
vas: Symmetric cascoded VAS with current mirrors
notes: Fast and clean, but wideband layout is more critical.

name: Folded cascode VAS, double EF AB
notes: Folded cascode preserves voltage swing better on +/-15 V rails.

name: BJT differential input, cascoded VAS, double EF AB
input_stage: Long-tailed BJT pair, one input grounded
notes: Better DC behavior, but the classic cascoded VAS is a little headroom-hungry at +/-15 V.

name: Single-ended cascoded VAS, double EF AB
input_stage: BJT emitter follower with RF/input reference
vas: NPN cascode VAS with transistor current source
notes: Simple AB baseline; acceptable headroom, but single-ended VAS leaves more even-order error.

name: JFET input, single-ended cascode, double EF AB
vas: NPN cascode VAS with discrete current source/sink
notes: JFET input impedance is convenient, but offset spread and low-rail headroom need care.
